articles.title: Ex-Ripple CTO’s Firm For Content Micro-Tipping Coil Winding Down: What It Means For XRP Ecosystem
articles.description: According to Thomas, the blockchain project which supported XRP micropayments in real-time is only bidding farewell but not goodbye.

articles.title: Aave integrates Chainlink’s proof of reserves on Avalanche via BGD Labs
articles.description: Chainlink’s Proof of Reserve (PoR) feature is now available on Aave lending platform on the Avalanche blockchain.

articles.title: Tech giant Dell joins Hedera’s governing council
articles.description: Technology giant Dell will join the likes of Google, FIS and Abrdn on the Hedera governing council. It will run a consensus node and explore use cases.

articles.title: Cardano DeFi TVL Rises More Than 100% In One Month
articles.description: DeFi protocols in Cardano, a proof-of-stake smart contracting platform, have locked over $100 million in user assets as of February 7. According to DeFiLlama statistics, Cardano DeFi protocols command a total value locked (TVL) of slightly over $103 million, which is more than 2X the amount on January 1. Early this year, Cardano TVL stood at $48.95 million. The upswing of TVL could be because...
